name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Charlotte, NC's 24-hour Western Union Money Order Only at N Graham St offers convenient money orders and check cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only operates 24/7 at 1134 N Graham St in Charlotte, NC, providing a standalone money order and check cashing facility. Located in Charlotte's busy N Graham Street corridor, this location is open around the clock every day of the week, making it accessible whether you need services early morning, late night, or any time in between.

At this Charlotte location, customers can send money orders, cash checks, and access other money transfer services. Call 704-375-2521 to confirm specific services available or for questions about requirements before your visit to the N Graham St location in Charlotte, NC.

If you're a Charlotte resident needing quick money order services, the 24-hour availability at this N Graham Street location in Charlotte means you can visit whenever fits your schedule. Bring a valid photo ID and your payment method for money orders or the check you need cashed.
pros: No bank account or credit card required to purchase or use money orders
Prepaid structure eliminates overdraft fees and guarantees fund availability
Money orders do not expire (though state rules may assess fees after 1-3 years of non-use)
Can be cashed at multiple outlets: banks, grocery stores, check-cashing locations, and other retailers
Online refund request process available with receipt documentation
Widely available through extensive Western Union location network across the U.S.
Secure alternative to sending cash for unbanked consumers and those without checking accounts
cons: Not all Western Union locations can cash money orders—only purchase locations are guaranteed
Nominal fees charged for money order purchases vary by location and add to transaction cost
Refund requests incur additional fees and refunded amounts depend on original principal
Maximum money order amounts may be limited at certain locations
Banks and retailers may charge fees to cash the money order
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without checking accounts who need secure payment methods
Renters and tenants paying property management companies that do not accept personal checks
Individuals sending funds to friends or family who prefer not to use cash or electronic transfers
Consumers making purchases where checks or cash are not accepted and credit cards are unavailable
diagnosis: Western Union money orders are best for unbanked consumers and renters who need a secure, check-like payment method without a bank account. The primary caveat is that not all Western Union locations can cash money orders, requiring customers to potentially visit banks or retailers, which may impose additional fees.
services: Money order purchase at physical Western Union locations
Money order payment processing using cash or debit card
Money order filling and completion assistance
Money order status checking using receipt details
Online money order refund request submission
Money order cashing at Western Union locations (where available)
Bank deposit capability for money orders
Bill payment services via money order
Guidance on accepted payment methods by location
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 1134 N Graham St, Charlotte, NC. 24-hour money order and check cashing.
